_comment: Overlay drop to /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.d/20-team-brain.json (owner: root). Claude Code COMBINES hooks across all settings sources, so this adds the team-brain hooks org-wide WITHOUT touching any user's ~/.claude/settings.json. autoMemoryEnabled:false disables Claude's native file-based memory fleet-wide (users can't re-enable) so team-brain is THE memory system. All hooks are subcommands of the single brain.sh; each guards against BRAIN_DISTILLER recursion.
